name: spotify-cli-mcp
description: Control and query the Spotify desktop app -- playback, search, playlists, library, devices -- through natural language.
long_description:
Connects Claude to Spotify via the desktop app's own bundled local CLI helper (no API keys or OAuth needed -- it uses whichever Spotify account is already logged in on this machine). Covers playback control, device management, the playback queue, Jam sessions, search and rich track/artist/album lookup (including BPM, musical key, and Camelot key for DJ-style mixing), listening history, your saved library, playlists, and playlist folders.

This is an unofficial, community-built project and is not affiliated with, endorsed by, or supported by Spotify. It can create, modify, and permanently delete real playlists, library items, and playlist folders in your Spotify account -- always review what an AI assistant is about to do before confirming, especially for anything described as destructive or irreversible below. Requires the Spotify desktop app to be installed, running, and logged in on this machine; it cannot be used with a remote/hosted MCP client since it shells out to a local binary.

tools.name: play
tools.description: Play a Spotify URI, or resume playback

tools.name: pause
tools.description: Pause playback

tools.name: resume
tools.description: Resume playback

tools.name: skip_to_next
tools.description: Skip to the next track

tools.name: skip_to_previous
tools.description: Skip to the previous track

tools.name: seek
tools.description: Seek to (or by) a position in the current track

tools.name: set_shuffle
tools.description: Turn shuffle on or off

tools.name: set_repeat
tools.description: Set repeat mode (off, context, or track)

tools.name: set_playback_speed
tools.description: Set playback speed (0.0-2.0)

tools.name: set_volume
tools.description: Set playback volume (0.0-1.0)

tools.name: get_now_playing
tools.description: Show the currently playing track

tools.name: list_devices
tools.description: List connected playback devices

tools.name: get_device_info
tools.description: Show detailed info for a specific device

tools.name: transfer_playback
tools.description: Transfer playback to a specific device

tools.name: set_device_volume
tools.description: Set volume on a specific device

tools.name: get_queue
tools.description: View the playback queue

tools.name: add_to_queue
tools.description: Add a track to the end of the playback queue

tools.name: remove_from_queue
tools.description: Remove a track from the playback queue by position

tools.name: move_in_queue
tools.description: Reorder a track within the playback queue

tools.name: get_jam_status
tools.description: Show the current Jam session status

tools.name: list_jam_members
tools.description: List members of the current Jam session

tools.name: create_jam
tools.description: Start a new Jam session

tools.name: leave_jam
tools.description: Leave the current Jam session

tools.name: end_jam
tools.description: End the current Jam session (host only)

tools.name: kick_from_jam
tools.description: Remove a member from the Jam session (host only)

tools.name: set_jam_permissions
tools.description: View or change Jam session permissions

tools.name: search
tools.description: Search the Spotify catalog for tracks, artists, albums, and more

tools.name: lookup_metadata
tools.description: Resolve one or more Spotify URIs to rich metadata, including BPM, musical key, and Camelot key

tools.name: get_taste_profile
tools.description: Show your Spotify-generated music taste profile

tools.name: get_top_history
tools.description: Show your most-played tracks/artists

tools.name: get_recent_history
tools.description: Show your recently played tracks

tools.name: list_library
tools.description: List saved items in your library

tools.name: check_library_contains
tools.description: Check whether items are saved in your library

tools.name: add_to_library
tools.description: Save items to your library

tools.name: remove_from_library
tools.description: Permanently remove saved items from your library

tools.name: run_library_batch
tools.description: Run a batch of mixed library/playlist/folder operations in one call

tools.name: get_playlist
tools.description: Get a playlist's details and tracks

tools.name: create_playlist
tools.description: Create a new playlist

tools.name: update_playlist
tools.description: Update a playlist's name, description, cover image, or visibility

tools.name: add_tracks_to_playlist
tools.description: Add tracks to a playlist

tools.name: remove_tracks_from_playlist
tools.description: Permanently remove tracks from a playlist by position

tools.name: list_folders
tools.description: List playlist folders

tools.name: create_folder
tools.description: Create a new playlist folder

tools.name: rename_folder
tools.description: Rename a playlist folder

tools.name: move_to_folder
tools.description: Move playlists or folders into another folder

tools.name: remove_folder
tools.description: Remove a playlist folder (nested playlists kept by default)

tools.name: get_current_user
tools.description: Show the currently logged-in Spotify user

tools.name: get_connection_status
tools.description: Check whether the Spotify desktop app is running and logged in

tools.name: open_spotify_app
tools.description: Launch or focus the Spotify desktop app

tools.name: navigate_to_uri
tools.description: Navigate the Spotify app to a specific URI

tools.name: get_cli_version
tools.description: Show the Spotify CLI and helper versions

spotify_cli_path.title: Spotify CLI path (optional)
spotify_cli_path.description: Only needed if Spotify.app is installed somewhere other than /Applications. Path to the 'spotify_cli' binary inside Spotify.app/Contents/MacOS/.
